name: Brandon the Builder
notability: Credited with building Winterfell and the Wall.
notes: Legendary figure of the Age of Heroes, ancestor of House Stark.

name: Lann the Clever
notes: Legendary progenitor of House Lannister.

name: The Grey King
notability: Slew the sea dragon Nagga, taught men to sail.
notes: Mythical ruler of the Iron Islands; claimed ancestor of Ironborn houses.

name: Garth Greenhand
notability: Taught farming and settlement; ancestor of many houses.
notes: Legendary High King of the First Men.

name: Garth the Gardener
notes: Son of Garth Greenhand; founder of House Gardener.

name: Durran Godsgrief
notes: Legendary first Storm King; ancestor of House Durrandon.

name: The Winged Knight
notability: Fought giants; ancient protector of the Vale.
notes: Mythical hero from early Vale legends.

name: Ellyn Ever‑Sweet
notes: Said to have a pact with the King of Bees.

name: Florys the Fox
notability: Known for trickery; kept three husbands unaware.
notes: Ancestor of House Florent and related houses.

name: Gilbert of the Vines
notes: Mythical progenitor of House Redwyne.

name: Harlon the Hunter
notes: Linked to origin stories around Horn Hill.

name: Herndon of the Horn
notes: Part of Horn Hill mythic ancestry.

name: Bors the Breaker
notes: Linked with heroic tales of the age.

name: John the Oak
notes: Part of regional heroic legends.

name: Rowan Gold‑Tree
notability: Heroic figure tied to ancient tales.
notes: Linked to lore in the Reach.

name: Maris the Maid
notes: Part of localized heroic tradition.

name: Owen Oakenshield
notes: Mythic ancestor of Oakheart lines.

name: Foss the Archer
notes: Mentioned among heroic figures.

name: Rose of Red Lake
notability: Fabled figure associated with Red Lake myths.
notes: Her story is part of regional legend.

name: Symeon Star‑Eyes
notes: Part of the Age of Heroes heroic list.

name: Serwyn of the Mirror Shield

name: Florian the Fool
